notes: US-based personal care ingredient specialist focused on innovative and sustainable actives for hair and scalp care. Active Concepts offers a portfolio of natural-origin and biotechnology-derived actives targeting follicle stimulation, hair strengthening, anti-breakage, and scalp health. Their fermentation-derived actives and peptide-based ingredients provide enhanced bioavailability and efficacy, making them a preferred supplier for premium hair care brands seeking science-backed, sustainable ingredients.
